steps.t: Field stones can be found near the edge of the woods in Laerlad. You should gather field stones for Evorik.
Crumbling walls can be found in Blómgard. You should place the stones next to the crumbling walls in Blómgard so the Woodfolk may repair them.
Evorik can be found in Blómgard. You should talk to Evorik.
